diagnostic_status.recommended_next_action: Proceed to toy-model full integration convergence audit before real material production energy.

material_response_grid_requirements.Q_zero_warning: Q=0 has undefined TE/TM in-plane direction and must be handled by symmetry/limit or excluded from angular-grid production runs.
material_response_grid_requirements.cutoff_convergence: High-frequency and large-Q cutoffs require convergence tests.
material_response_grid_requirements.existing_validation_cases_insufficient: Existing 8 validation reflection cases are not a production integration grid.
material_response_grid_requirements.final_basis: All reflection matrices must be represented in the common lab TE/TM basis.
material_response_grid_requirements.grid_convergence: n_max, Q_max, n_Q, and n_phi require convergence audits.
material_response_grid_requirements.quadrature_warning: Simple scaffold weights are not production quadrature.
material_response_grid_requirements.required_data: sigma_tilde(i*xi_n,Q,phi) or R_TE_TM(i*xi_n,Q,phi) on a two-dimensional Matsubara/polar grid
material_response_grid_requirements.response_strategy: Use a validated interpolation strategy or compute response directly at every grid point.

measure_summary.quadrature_scope: scaffold only; not production convergence quadrature

purpose: Casimir energy integration grid planning and scaffold

target_formula.free_energy_density: F/A = k_B*T*sum_n' integral d^2Q/(2*pi)^2 logdet[I-exp(-2*kappa*d) R1 R2]

warnings: Q=0 has undefined TE/TM in-plane direction and must be handled by symmetry/limit or excluded from angular-grid production runs.
Existing 8 validation reflection cases are not a production integration grid.
This scaffold does not perform full Matsubara sum or full Q integration.
No Casimir energy, force, or torque is output.
